reforms.description: The government has embarked on a programme to invest in the information technology sector through education, including plans to wire all health institutions and develop telemedicine infrastructure, aimed at improving health services in rural areas.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in telemedicine infrastructure is expected to enhance healthcare delivery and accessibility, thereby improving overall health outcomes and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been actively pursued and is in operation.
reforms.importance_rationale: The investment in telemedicine infrastructure represents a significant but not transformative change in the health sector.
reforms.source_quote: The government has embarked on its own programme to invest in that area through education, with plans to include instruction on the use of such technology at all grade levels, and health care where action is under way to wire all health institutions and administrators in one 'Health Net' and develop the infrastructure for 'telemedicine'.

reforms.description: The government has taken steps to aid the development of biotechnology, including legislation allowing the creation of a centralized, depersonalized database containing health and genetic information, which is expected to enhance research capabilities.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of a centralized health database is anticipated to facilitate advanced research in biotechnology, leading to innovations and improvements in health outcomes.
reforms.status_evidence: The legislation has been enacted and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The legislation represents a significant step towards enhancing the biotechnology sector but does not constitute a complete overhaul of the system.
reforms.source_quote: Prospects for more major breakthroughs were enhanced when the parliament passed legislation in December 1998 allowing the creation of a centralised, depersonalised database containing health and genetic information.
